validation_status.author: claude-sonnet-4-6
validation_status.validation_description: 'Rio Tinto Lithium' appeared as a separate row in the source sheet and has been merged into the main 'Rio Tinto' entry with Lithium appended to main_focus. Rio Tinto Lithium is not a legally distinct entity — it refers to Rio Tinto's lithium business unit (Rincon project, Argentina). Merge is likely correct, but the dual appearance in the sheet may indicate intent to track it separately as a business unit. Confirm whether a separate entry for the Lithium division is desired.

validation_status.author: claude-sonnet-4-6
validation_status.validation_description: Glencore appears twice in the source sheet: once as 'Mining' (sector, TAX ID CHE-106.909.694) and once as 'Tech' (same TAX ID, no main_focus). The two rows have been merged with concatenated main_focus. The 'Tech' row in the sheet contains a Wikidata ID (Q182477) that actually belongs to Nvidia — likely a spreadsheet data entry error. Manual review needed: confirm sector classification (Mining/Commodities, not Tech) and correct the Wikidata assignment.

validation_status.author: claude-sonnet-4-6
validation_status.validation_description: Source sheet lists 'Patria Group' (Finnish defence and aerospace group, TAX ID FI01124204) under Defence sector. This was mapped to 'Patricomp Oy' in investments.json, which is a subsidiary of Patria Group specialising in armoured vehicle maintenance and upgrades. Patricomp Oy and Patria Group are legally distinct entities with different business scopes. Recommend: (1) rename the investments.json key from 'Patricomp Oy' to 'Patria Group', or (2) create a separate entry for Patria Group and retain Patricomp Oy independently. Do not treat them as equivalent without further verification.

validation_status.author: claude-sonnet-4-6
validation_status.validation_description: Two sheet rows — 'Neo Performance Mat.' (sector: Neodimio) and 'Neo Performance (Gallium)' (sector: Gallium) — were both mapped to the single investments.json key 'NeoPerformance'. main_focus has been concatenated with ' | ' separator. Neo Performance Materials Corp. is a single legal entity covering multiple critical minerals (rare earths, gallium, etc.), so the merge is likely correct. However, the sector field only retains the first row's sector (Neodimio). Consider using a multi-value sector field or splitting into sub-entries by material focus.
